Oil WTI $73.30-74, Brent $79 (+7-11%). 10-Year Treasury 4.58% (4-week high). Gold rangebound ~$3,400+ (safe-haven bid to USD, not gold). DAL reports Q2 tomorrow (July 10). 13 earnings today — none from our watchlist. July 9: Nasdaq futures +0.55%, S&P +0.13%, Dow -0.10%. Iran escalation is key macro risk all day.
